strengths: 15+ years of full-stack and distributed-systems engineering across multiple domains
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Strong software craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development
concerns: No demonstrated executive leadership or experience scaling engineering orgs from 10 to 30+
Lacks production multi-agent AI system ownership at the scale required for a CTO role
Limited fintech-infrastructure depth in credit risk, working-capital, or regulated trade decisioning

key_factors.factor: Broad full-stack and distributed-systems engineering background

response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned senior/staff-level engineer with broad full-stack, distributed-systems, and craftsmanship experience, plus emerging exposure to agentic AI tooling via MCP work at re:cinq. However, the resume does not show executive leadership, organizational scaling from 10 to 30+ engineers, production multi-agent AI ownership, or fintech-infrastructure depth in credit risk and regulated trade decisioning — all of which are central to this CTO role.
